name: 5Star Bank
description_short: 5Star Bank is an FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with locations in Colorado.
description_long:
5Star Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank headquartered in Colorado with physical locations in Colorado Springs, Greenwood Village, and Trinidad. The bank is Member FDIC and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable FDIC limits. Founded to serve both personal and business banking needs, 5Star Bank has positioned itself as a community-focused financial institution.

5Star Bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), individual retirement accounts (IRAs), personal loans, residential mortgages, home equity loans, and credit cards with rewards programs. On the business side, they provide commercial checking accounts (including analysis checking), business savings, business CDs, commercial loans, commercial real estate loans, SBA loans, business lines of credit, business credit cards, cash management services, remote deposit capture, merchant card processing, and specialized financing for niche industries including food service, government contractors, and supply chain operations. The bank also offers dedicated banking solutions for veterans and service members, plus workplace banking programs for employers and employees.

5Star Bank differentiates itself through industry-specialized lending services not commonly found at larger banks, including supply chain financing and government contractor programs. They offer accessibility features (AudioEye enabled website), mobile banking with mobile deposit, and electronic fund services including EFTPS tax payments. Their marketing emphasizes personalized service through multiple contact channels (1-800-776-2265) and educational resources including podcasts, financial calculators, and security education focused on elder abuse prevention and identity protection.

As a regional bank with limited branch locations (three known locations in Colorado), 5Star Bank's reach is geographically constrained compared to national banks. Specific interest rates, fees, loan terms, and detailed product features are not disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact for pricing information. The bank appears well-capitalized and properly regulated but lacks the digital convenience and product breadth of larger national or online-only banks.
services: Personal checking accounts (including Kasasa Cash checking)
Personal savings accounts and money market accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) for personal and business
Home equity loans and overdraft protection
Commercial loans, commercial real estate loans, and SBA loans
Business lines of credit and letters of credit
Business credit cards and Visa rewards cards
Cash management and remote deposit capture
Specialized financing (supply chain, food industry, government contractors)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Specialized business lending for niche industries (food, government contractors, supply chain)
Mobile banking with mobile deposit capture for remote check processing
Comprehensive SBA loan programs and commercial real estate financing
Dedicated financial solutions for veterans and military service members
Online banking with bill pay and eStatements for account management
Rewards credit cards (Visa 5Star Rewards) for personal and business use
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only three known Colorado branch locations
No interest rates, fees, or specific loan terms disclosed on website
Limited online banking convenience compared to national or neobanks
Regional bank status may mean fewer ATM locations and limited services outside Colorado
No mention of mobile app download links or digital-first banking features

contact.address: 104 S Cascade Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

best_for: Colorado-based small business owners seeking specialized industry lending (food, government contracting)
Veterans and military service members accessing dedicated financial products
Local Colorado residents preferring community bank relationships over national institutions
Businesses needing commercial real estate loans and SBA financing options
diagnosis: 5Star Bank is best for Colorado-based small business owners and residents seeking personalized community banking with specialized lending programs for niche industries, plus veterans accessing dedicated military financial solutions. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Colorado, lack of transparent pricing on the website, and reduced digital convenience compared to larger national or online-only banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 104 S Cascade Ave, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
